events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On the Floor'.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo! What's your favourite track from the multi-talented icon?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the iconic Rolling Stones frontman.

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched 45 years ago today, revolutionising music and pop culture with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Remembering MTV's Debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched and changed the game for music forever! What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe', featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever', was released 32 years ago today.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Legacy
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to a whole new Britpop sound. Still sounds as fresh today!

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an event synonymous with peace and music, began 57 years ago today in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Revisited
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which legendary performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away at his Graceland home.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years on, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, is still deeply missed but never forgotten. His music lives on.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The inimitable Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! An absolute icon of rock, still delivering those powerful vocals.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam's Big Day
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment or track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something', was released in the UK 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Enduring Charm
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod 25 years ago, revolutionising portable music players and changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod's Quarter Century
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? The first iPod was released 25 years ago today, changing the game for music lovers everywhere.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated worldwide, marking the anniversary of the release of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and all the iconic theme tunes. Which is your favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, universally known as 'The White Album', was released 58 years ago today, showcasing the band's diverse musical directions.

angles.name: The White Album Legacy
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling masterpiece that still sparks debate among fans today!
